achievements.name: Moonmist Treasure Hunter
achievements.desc: Open 45 chests in the Dunanna Pit and the Frost Moon

achievements.name: Moonmist Treasure Hunter
achievements.desc: Open 90 chests in the Dunanna Pit and the Frost Moon

achievements.name: Moonmist Treasure Hunter
achievements.desc: Open 180 chests in the Dunanna Pit and the Frost Moon

achievements.name: Moonmist Adventurer
achievements.desc: Complete 4 Open World Time Trial Challenges in the Dunanna Pit and the Frost Moon.

achievements.name: A Lamentation of Catastrophe
achievements.desc: Light up the Dunanna Pit map.

achievements.name: Blue Moon
achievements.desc: Light up the Lunar Highlands map.

achievements.name: Any Colour You Like
achievements.desc: Light up the Dark Side of the Moon map.

achievements.name: Le Voyage dans la Lune
achievements.desc: Unlock all Teleport Waypoints in Nod-Krai and the following areas in the Frost Moon region: Dunanna Pit, Lunar Highlands, and Dark Side of the Moon.

achievements.name: A Fall of Moondust
achievements.desc: Unlock all the seals on the Kuuhenki Shrines in the following areas in the Frost Moon region: Lunar Highlands, Moontide Sea, and Dark Side of the Moon.

achievements.name: Hoards Found — We Don't Have a Problem
achievements.desc: Unlock all the seals on the Kuuhenki's Hidden Troves in the following areas in the Frost Moon region: Lunar Highlands and Moontide Sea.

achievements.name: Darkness Out of Space
achievements.desc: Upgrade the Curtain-Form Blackbody Containment Lab to its maximum level.

achievements.name: The Inner Light
achievements.desc: Upgrade the Nuur Stone Circle to its maximum level.
